feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: selecting a cell in sac table
entry.content:
Is it possible to know which cell/dimension was clicked in a table during the "onSelect" event?

Method getSelections() seems to retrieve the same information (whole row) when different cells in the same row are clicked, even when the table's selection type is set to "Single Cell".

Thanks!

entry.title: How do I add a button to each row in a table in sap analytics cloud?
Is it possible to create segment buttons without default button selected?
New SAC tenant URL: How long is time period for data migration (parallel 2 tenant)?
entry.content:
We are planning a new URL and than we have to migrate the content see SAP-Note: 2793071

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2793071

In this note I found this information about time period: 

"Please note that the new tenant creation (provisioning) is not immediate.
When it is complete, customers will be provided with a specified period to perform the content and data migration."

I have 2 questions:

1. Can we determine when the new URL should be available so we can plan setup and data migration internally?

2. How long is the specific time period for data migration for us where the 2 tenant are parallel available?

Thanks 

Beat

entry.title: Maximum call stack size exceeded in sac table
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

While trying to use a formula in the formula bar for an added row of sac table, it shwos an error "Maximum call stack size exceeded". How can we resolve this?

Thanks

entry.title: How to create a button to filter table to today date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want a table that displays sales info that has 3 buttons that will change the date filter of this table, the 3 buttons being:

Button 1 - Yesterday Date 

Button 2 MTD Date 

Button 3 YTD Date 

Can any one tell me how to do this?

entry.title: Top 5/Bot 5 based on Drop down to filter table and chart
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have requirement to filter Top 5 or Bot 5 contributors on a Measure but I want it to be driven through the Input field Dropdown with two values TOP 5 and BOT 5. when I select the values the Table_1 and chart_1 should have a particular Measure restricted to top 5 values or Bottom 5 values.

I have tried below code but it is not working as expected. I think it is possible to do it via Scripting changing filters of table and chart . Can someone help me on below code issue.

@N1kh1l If you have any solution please let me know.

Thanks & Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: Usage of "JustAsk" within the story in a separate panel.
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Good day!!

Requirement : User wanted to create charts by just giving prompts in text. We know that we have this feature in JustAsk.

Is it possible to use the JustAsk within the Story page as a separate panel? Instead of clicking the JustAsk Button.

I searched for the APIs for JustAsk but not able to find any.

Thank you for reading through!! 🙂

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Sap analytics cloud reset all presentation filters
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a story in SAC based on BW live data with prompt (company code, date).

I use presentation filters that I can use to filters some informations (Profit center, WBS).

I run the story filling the prompt with company 1000, year 2024.

If I filter lets say my story for one WBS, and I click on the icon prompt to change the company (2000), the story keeps the filter on WBS and of course its a non sense because this gives an empty result as WBS filtered is related to company 1000.

Is there a way to reset with scripting the presentation filters ?

thanks

Ma

entry.title: Predictive forecast tool in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content: Hello experts, I am referencing the new standard SAP delivered model SAP__FI_CLM_IM_LIQUIDITY_PLAN for Liquidity planning stories, however I do not see the predictive forecast feature in the tool, can you please suggest the possible issue for this, on our previous model SAP__FI_CLM_IM_LIQPLN, we have the  predictive forecast option available.

entry.title: Change default tooltip to a shape in a Story
entry.content:
Hello - We have inserted a shape in one of our stories in SAC and this shape is linked to navigate to another story upon clicking on it. When we over the mouse, it shows as popup as shown in below image.

What is being shown in the tooltip is the technical name of the story. I could not find an option to change it. In the context menu I see only below options and I don't see any option in the styling too. Any inputs here would help.

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: Exit Fullscreen navigates to previous page in SAC Stories
entry.content:
Hello - Exit Fullscreen in SAC Story toolbar is navigating to the "Previous Webpage" most of the time instead of exiting the full screen and giving an option to navigate through the options such as Modeler, Data Actions.... This is happening in the quality system. "Exit Fullscreen" in Analytic Applications works perfectly though. Can you please guide?

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Offline Dashboarding
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Does anyone know if there is a way to display and work with a story offline?

The story would normally have a live data connection, but we have a requirement that users would need to use it in certain situations when there's no internet connection possibility.

Thank you.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: How to integrate Workforce analytics in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Can any one guide us to create a connection from Success factor workforce analytics to SAP Analytics Cloud.
we would required to know the configurations in Success factor to enable workforce analytics.

Expecting a quick support.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: TabStrip in Popup does not work in different pages of the SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have Story Popup created with TabStrip and several tabs. I want to use them among different pages created in the SAC Story but it says that TabStrip can not be used as is on different page.

Popup_4.open();
TabStrip_2.setSelectedKey("Tab_4");

See attached the error message.

I have to copy the PopUp in all Canvas pages in order to work, is that a way to avoid so many tables to be duplicated?

entry.title: Remove and add Measure in a button
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am working on a project involving a budget plan with 4 measures (measure 1, 2, 3, and 4). After the user completes the planning, they need to compare measure 4 across a different dimension. Imagine this dimension has 3 variables, and measure 4 will appear for each of these 3 variables. I want to create a button script that hides measures 1, 2, and 3, leaving only measure 4 visible for comparison across the dimension. Then, when the user clicks the button again, measures 1, 2, and 3 should reappear.

Thanks in Advance,
GAnjos

entry.title: BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order at item but on SO print should reflect?
entry.content:
Hi, 

is Anyone can help me to sort my client requirement?

My Client is using SAP Public Cloud and they required the below.

They need BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order item level, but it should come on Sales Order print form and also production will be done for the material.

Thanks and regards

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: Deployment of ML Models in SAP AC
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

Just wanted to know that can we deploy our own ML Python based models for advanced analytics for reporting without S4/Hana or Datasphere. Currently using Sap Analytics Cloud with BW and nothing else. 

 

Thanks

SAP Analytics Cloud Machine Learning

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud data label total missing
entry.content:
Hi 

(Regarding Optimized story on live connection to BW 7.5)

On left picture Totals are not shown. Removing the checkmark as shown in Styling, return the totals in second printscreen. However, then the detailed labels are overlapping.

Do anyone know, how I can show totals only on the first printscreen in the 2 blue boxes? In other words, this 'Avoid Data Label Overlap' should not remove the total. Is there a way?

thx

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Advanced Formula "LINK" is not working
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I duplicated a planning model and now want to transfer the values from the productive model to the backup model using a Data Action with the LINK function. However, it's not copying any values. What could I be overlooking?

DATA() = LINK([PlanModel] , [d/Version]="public.Forecast", [d/Measures]="Amount")

 Kind regards,

Ismail
